deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip opportunity. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K. Projected profit $42-62K. Close target May 1. Template build for branded property analysis tool.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Isaac Linares proposed mobile home development with veteran housing component at ~$150K. Title defect in deed recording. Chris walking away, signs picked up May 28.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Chris walking away. Signs retrieved. No path forward.
Isaac expanded concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Isaac discussed development concept. Sisters enthusiastic about $150K offer pending mobile home project details.
Active call priority. Past and recent prospects need outreach.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan property. Underwater $93-143K. Listed $528,999, market value $350-400K. Double-carrying costs ~$5,300/mo. Chandler laid off (hardship documented). Termination release sent May 29. Owners moving back in, plan to relist after updates.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Owners moving back in, planning relist after repairs.
Called Matt and Chandler. Presented three paths. They leaning toward short sale. Chandler laid off - hardship documented.
Email sent with market analysis. Option 3 highlighted - strategic drop to $518,999.
Gilberto buyers wishy-washy. Price adjustment conversation needed. Potential short sale situation.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Out of Corpus deal. Rental being sold, need to move faster. Out of 916 Marriott (foundation issues). Pivoting to new construction, no HOA. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K. Zach S and Isaac involved. Needs confirmation on FHA 203k feasibility.
deals.next: Follow up on Corpus deal decision and new construction search restart

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus at $85K. Connected with Zach S and Isaac directly.
Rental being sold, need faster timeline. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, pass.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: Divorce situation, need to sell. Prior clients who used VA renovation loan. 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K (as of May 2026). Recommended list price $295K. CMA pulled May 15. Net sheet built. Colton possible contractor work angle at 181 CR 7751.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb. CMA pulled. Built listing presentation.
Prior clients going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA Laura Heights PUD. Sellers relocating to NC, June deadline. List price $259,900. Second-look buyers came back, favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Insurance adjuster completed roof inspection. Loan payoff discrepancy noted (seller $170K vs public records $192K).
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers after pre-inspection offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers back - favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled to May 30.
Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300. Keeping conversation open.
MLS live. First showing - cultural concern about street direction. Canvassed neighborhood.
Listing consultation with Isaac present. Went well. Confirmed list price $259,900.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Closed April 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature. Chicago Title handled closing. Military buyer through Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA.
deals.next: Joy gift delivery pending. Thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi still pending.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Chicago Title.
Contacted lien holder Fabian Cerrillo. He was understanding and cooperative.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza family at $113,000. Buyer agent Javier working amendment. EMD not yet received. Chicago Title handling escrow with Alyssa Castillo. Backup offer interest received.

logs.m: Under contract with Espinoza buyers. TXR 1903 sent to Javier. EMD not yet received.
Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.
Steve sent new photos. Clearing complete. Drone footage flagged as priority.
Clearing complete. Photos being posted to social media.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned property. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Drywall done, flooring starting this week. Water meter pending. HouzzPro/Matt Toney managing renovation. Cameras installed. Medina Electric and EMCSUD utilities identified. Police reports still pending.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm meter install status. Police report follow-up.

logs.m: Electric reconnected. Drywall complete, second paint round. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days.
Drywall crew patching remaining holes. Sent photos to Kelly.
Utilities confirmed: Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Email sent to Kelly with contact info.
Met with Matt Toney. Connected with Jerry Sadler directly. Work starts by Monday.

Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover invested time.

Spoke today - sick grandkid. Follow up tomorrow.
Confirmed military retirement + daughters live with her. Follow-up text sent.

Buyer rep sent to Milagros. She is not locked into Grace Gardens.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned situation - neighbor passed, son now owns. Avid gardener angle.
